title: CG 2000
text: Home * Conferences * Computer and Games 2000 < Prev Next > The Second International Conference on Computers and Games was held in Hamamatsu , Japan , October 26-28, 2000 . Contents 1 Proceedings 2 Lectures 2.1 Search and Strategies 2.2 Learning and Pattern Acquisition 2.3 Theory and Complexity Issues 2.4 Further Experiments with Games 2.5 Invited Talks and Reviews 3 Reports & Reviews 4 External Links 5 References Proceedings [ edit ] Tony Marsland and Ian Frank (eds.)
